title: Keel Toys SE6580 38cm Keeleco Dinosaurs 100% Recycled 100% Huggable ASSORTED ONE SUPPLIED AT RANDOM
features: Keeleco is the new 100% recycled range from Keel Toys 100% recycled material and filling
Environmentally friendly these toys are made and filled with 100% recycled plastic waste
Cuddly weighted with recycled glass beans, these squishy toys are perfectly designed for hugging from a lovely new friend
The Keeleco process gives plastic a second life and uses 59% less energy than pure polyester
description: Keel Toys are recognised worldwide by the iconic red disc in the ear of each toy, their seal of quality and value. As the first step in their new sustainability initiative they are excited to announce from November 2019 all factory shipments will now have a new Keel Toys symbol made from FSC cardboard, saving the millions of toys they sell each year. How is the Keel Eco Range made? Stage 1: Single use plastics and bottles have become one of the hot topics in recent years, leading to the increased use of recycled polyester. Recycled polyester, also known as rPET, is first obtained by collecting bottles and other plastic waste and cleaning. Stage 2: The cleaned bottles are then shredded. Stage 3: The shredded bottles are then shredded and formed into pellets. Stage 4: The pellets are then shredded and melted to create the yarn. Stage 5: The yarn is then spun to create the thread. The thread is then woven to create the base fabric.
